case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. WILFREDO DANIEL MARTINEZ RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED MAY-01-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, WILFREDO DANIEL MARTINEZ

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $635.69 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, WILFREDO DANIEL MARTINEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WILFREDO DANIEL MARTINEZ RODRIGUEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITHOUT PREJUDICE
